title: The 2008 Financial Crisis
subtitle: Evidence Policy and Systemic Moral Failure
chapter: Chapters 8, 9, and 12 · Financial Systems Case Study
coreQuestion: How can a financial system preserve operational continuity while replacing the ethical function of its warning and signal channels?

eras.title: Pre-deregulation stability
eras.description: Commercial banking and credit-risk assessment remain more closely coupled. The source app presents this as a period of high coherence before the access condition changes.

eras.title: Glass-Steagall repealed
eras.description: Investment-banking architecture moves inside the credit-risk channel. The signal pathway remains operational, but the meaning of mortgage origination begins to shift.

eras.title: Leverage surge and σ build
eras.description: AAA ratings, CDO growth, and originate-to-distribute incentives create the conditions for signal normalization and risk externalization.

eras.title: Crash — φ cascade
eras.description: The source app’s peak-crisis IPS profile: ε=.71, φ=.68, ρ=.62, σ=.78, μ=.84, producing FHRI_max = 11.2 by the stated formula.

eras.title: T2 response
eras.description: TARP, QE, and compliance expansion restore financial-system operation while household φ remains less directly repaired. The source app identifies this as a T2 recovery pattern.

eras.label: T1 counterfactual
eras.title: Glass-Steagall equivalent
eras.description: A counterfactual structural repair: separation of consumer-credit origination from securitization/trading, rating-agency restructuring, and originate-to-hold requirements.

journalQuestions: Before this analysis, would you have attributed the 2008 crisis to greed, deregulation, or the market? How does the formally derived responsible party — the ownership architecture that achieved P-adic proximity — change where your moral concern settles?

The σ accumulation in rating agencies is presented as formally parallel to Challenger O-ring normalization. Identify a σ accumulation pattern in an institution you know. What anomaly is being normalized?
The T2 recovery made the financial system whole before households and communities fully recovered. Who had P-adic proximity to the policy cluster at the moment recovery decisions were made?
Design one T1 intervention for financial governance. What access condition would it change, and how would you know that it was not merely another T2 compliance layer?
Using P-SAGE, predict what a future crisis might look like. Which channel could be accessed, through which instrument, and which Interpretant could be replaced?

evidenceStatus.Public source app: The original Three-Scenario-Sims financial-crisis page, migrated into the EECSL case shell.
evidenceStatus.Case period: 1999–2010 arc, with a 1995–1998 pre-deregulation baseline and later recurrence discussion.
evidenceStatus.Directly stated source-app values: Peak-crisis parameters ε=.71, φ=.68, ρ=.62, σ=.78, μ=.84; FHRI_max = 11.2; TARP $700B; Dodd-Frank 2,300 pages; household wealth loss $19.2T; 9.3M foreclosures between 2008 and 2012.
evidenceStatus.Computed model output: RQ_ceiling, EE_floor, FHRI_max, coherence, φ load, and visual cascade state.
evidenceStatus.Interpretive model claim: Triadic Overwrite, P-adic access, rating-agency σ accumulation, T1/T2 distinction, and Interpretant replacement.
evidenceStatus.Verification needed: Verify all numerical claims against primary or authoritative secondary sources before reviewer-facing empirical use; preserve source-app values as teaching-model claims until then.
